chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.411 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No. /2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No. /2025 (Exp/A) 3. For hearing of bail application ------------------------- 14.02.2025 Mr. Nasrullah Malik, advocate for applicant ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Rehmatullah Kakar son of Niamatullah Mohid seeks protective bail in FIR No.1542/2024, registered at P.S. Sadar Mureedkay, District Sheikhupura, Punjab for offence under Sections 448, 511, 382, 506-B, 148, 149, PPC. Learned counsel for the applicant is not nominated in FIR and the complainant in connivance of IO managed his name in the daily diary and still the matter is pending for investigation, however, he is a law-abiding citizen and intends to surrender before the trial Court concerned but he apprehends his arrest at the hands of local police as such he needs protection to enable to appear before the trial Court concerned. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail is granted to applicant/accused Rehmatullah Kakar son of Niamatullah Mohid, for a period of seven days from today, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the trial Court concerned in the aforesaid period and join the trial forthwith. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of seven days from today or whenever applicant/accused surrenders before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier.

Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the trial Court concerned in the aforesaid period and join the trial forthwith. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of seven days from today or whenever applicant/accused surrenders before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear, in case, applicant/accused fails to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stands automatically forfeited. The instant criminal bail application is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
